euler_problems: Problem 61 - Cyclical Figurate Numbers: Triangle, square, pentagonal, hexagonal, heptagonal, and octagonal numbers form a cyclic set of six 4-digit numbers where the last two digits of each equal the first two of the next. Find the sum of this set.
explanation: The code defines a framework to generate and search through polygonal numbers, storing them based on their two-digit prefixes and suffixes. It utilizes recursion to explore combinations of these polygonal numbers, checking for cycles that connect them and maintaining a count of how many complete sets have been found. When a valid combination of six polygonal numbers that forms a closed loop is identified, the code outputs the count and the sum of these numbers.
name: 2010-09-15_project-euler-problem-61-solution
subject: project euler problem 61 solution
summary: This project implements a solution to Project Euler problem 61, which involves finding a cyclic set of triangular, square, pentagonal, hexagonal, heptagonal, and octagonal numbers that share a common digit sequence.
